frontend.generated_shell:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
  <meta name="description" content="[[META_DESCRIPTION]]">
  <title>{% block title %}{% endblock %}</title>
  {% block extra_head %}{% endblock %}
</head>
<body class="{% block body_class %}{% endblock %}">
  <header class="site-shell-header">
    {% block site_header %}{% endblock %}
  </header>
  <main class="site-shell-main[[WRAP_MODIFIERS]]">
    <section class="site-shell-heading">
      [[HEADING]]
      [[SUBHEADING]]
    </section>
    {% block site_main %}{% endblock %}
  </main>
  {% block extra_scripts %}{% endblock %}
</body>
</html>

  <meta name="description" content="{% block meta_description %}{% endblock %}">
  <title>{% block title %}{% endblock %}</title>

</head>
<body class="{% block body_class %}{% endblock %}">

    [[HEADER]]
  </header>
  <main class="site-shell-main[[WRAP_MODIFIERS]]">
    <section class="site-shell-heading">
      [[HEADING]]
      [[SUBHEADING]]
    </section>
    {% block content %}{% endblock %}
  </main>
  {% block extra_scripts %}{% endblock %}
</body>
</html>

backend_info.generated_shell:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
  <meta name="description" content="[[META_DESCRIPTION]]">
  <title>{% block title %}{% endblock %}</title>
  [[EXTRA_HEAD]]
</head>
<body class="[[BODY_CLASS]]">
  <header class="site-shell-header">
    [[HEADER]]
  </header>
  <main class="site-shell-main{% block wrap_modifiers %}{% endblock %}">
    <section class="site-shell-heading">
      {% block heading %}{% endblock %}
      {% block subheading %}{% endblock %}
    </section>
    {% block body %}{% endblock %}
  </main>
  [[EXTRA_SCRIPTS]]
</body>
</html>
